content:
About

I am Asha Gallegos. I host The Asha Show on Rhythm FM 94.7 in Johannesburg, I am building the Off-Mic podcast (launching 2027-03-30), and I am writing a book on South African radio culture. This site is my show-notes archive and my open research notebook.
title: About

content:
Contact

For show requests, listener mail, or book research tips: asha.gallegos@gmail.com. Studio line for The Asha Show, weekday mornings: +27 11 555 0947. For Off-Mic, write to hello@offmicpodcast.co.za.
title: Contact

content:
Show-Notes Archive

Every episode of The Asha Show and every Off-Mic pilot, with track lists, interview links, and listener mail. Browse by month, or by category in the sidebar.
title: Show-Notes Archive

content:
The Book

I am writing a book on South African radio culture - from Springbok Radio and Radio Bantu to community stations after 1994. The proposal is due 2026-12-31. This page tracks the project and collects the research notes I post as I go.
title: The Book
